name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with 30-hour battery life. Multipoint connection lets you pair two devices simultaneously. Crystal clear hands-free calling with precise voice pickup.

name: Minimal Linen Shirt — Cream
description: Crafted from 100% European linen, this relaxed-fit shirt breathes beautifully in warm weather. Features a classic collar, chest pocket, and mother-of-pearl buttons.

name: Cast Iron Skillet 10-inch
description: Pre-seasoned and ready to use. Unparalleled heat retention and even cooking. Works on all cooktops including induction. Gets better with every use.

name: Atomic Habits — James Clear
description: A groundbreaking book about building good habits, breaking bad ones, and getting 1% better every day. Over 15 million copies sold worldwide.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S Mouse
description: 8K DPI any-surface tracking. Ultra-fast MagSpeed electromagnetic scroll wheel. Customizable with Logi Options+. Works across 3 computers with Easy-Switch.

name: Yoga Mat — Non-Slip Pro
description: 6mm thick high-density foam with double-layer non-slip texture. Moisture-resistant surface and alignment lines. Includes carrying strap.

name: Kindle Paperwhite 11th Gen
description: 6.8" display with adjustable warm light for a paper-like reading experience. IPX8 waterproof rated. Weeks of battery life. Holds thousands of books.

name: Chelsea Leather Boots — Black
description: Full-grain leather upper with elastic side panels for easy on and off. Rubber lug sole for grip. Leather lining for comfort. A wardrobe staple.

name: Aeropress Coffee Maker
description: Makes 1-3 cups of smooth, rich coffee in about a minute. Micro-filtered for grit-free coffee. Lightweight, compact, and virtually unbreakable.

name: Clean Code — Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship. Packed with best practices and examples in Java, C++, and C#. Essential reading for every serious developer.

name: Resistance Bands Set (5-pack)
description: 5 resistance levels from 10 to 50 lbs. Made from natural latex. Includes carrying bag and exercise guide. Perfect for home or gym workouts.

name: Samsung 27" 4K Monitor
description: 3840x2160 UHD IPS panel with 99% sRGB color coverage. USB-C with 65W power delivery. Height, tilt, and swivel adjustable stand. HDR10 support.
